meta.title: S4x22 Call For Presentations
meta.description:
Want to increase your chances of getting on the S4x22 Stage next 25-27 Jan 2022? Then watch this video. 
If you are in a hurry go straight to the tips:

05:19 Tips to increase your chances of your session getting accepted

08:46 Tips on what is unlikely to get accepted

errors: Download failed - yt-dlp error: ERROR: [youtube] dob1D7014F8: Unable to download API page: ('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required')) (caused by ProxyError("('Unable to connect to proxy', OSError('Tunnel connection failed: 402 Payment Required'))")); please report this issue on  https://github.com/yt-dlp/yt-dlp/issues?q= , filling out the appropriate issue template. Confirm you are on the latest version using  yt-dlp -U
